summary: Tested Secret Garden Box feature on Mitti Basket. Farm Basket page (/farm-basket-subscription) is fully functional with all features working correctly. However, found 1 critical bug: 'Join Waitlist' button still exists in homepage hero section (should have been removed per requirements).

ui_bugs.issue: 'Join Waitlist' button still present in hero section - should be removed per requirements

passed_tests: Homepage: Secret Garden Section visible with garden image, 'SEASONAL CURATION' label, 'The Secret Garden Box' title, Rs.2,599 price
Homepage: 'UNLOCK THE BOX' CTA button present and clickable
Homepage: 'UNLOCK THE BOX' button navigates to /farm-basket-subscription correctly
Farm Basket page: Hero shows Secret Garden Box content with garden background
Farm Basket page: Product card with artisan jars image and 'EXCLUSIVE' badge
Farm Basket page: Subscribe Quarterly toggle works (active by default)
Farm Basket page: One-Time Purchase toggle works
Farm Basket page: Button text changes correctly ('Subscribe & Add to Cart' vs 'Add to Cart')
Farm Basket page: 'Subscribe & Add to Cart' button adds item to cart
Farm Basket page: After adding, button changes to 'In Your Basket'
Farm Basket page: Story section with quote and description text visible
Farm Basket page: 'What to Expect' section shows 4 stat cards (7 items, Rs.5,100+ value, 3mo cycle, 0 repeats)
Farm Basket page: Village Pantry products grid visible with 8 products
Farm Basket page: FAQ accordion with 5 questions works correctly
Cart: Secret Garden Box (Quarterly) shows correctly in cart drawer after adding
Cart: Secret Garden Box (One-time) shows correctly in cart drawer after adding
Cart: Price shows correctly as Rs.2,599
Farm Basket page: No waitlist form present
failed_tests: Homepage: 'Join Waitlist' button still present in hero section (should be removed)
action_items: CRITICAL: Remove 'Join Waitlist' button from hero section in HomePage.js (lines 81-87). The button text says 'Join Waitlist' but links to /farm-basket-subscription. Per requirements, this should be completely removed from the homepage.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js lines 81-87: 'Join Waitlist' button still exists in HeroCarousel component - needs to be removed
The button currently links to /farm-basket-subscription but the text still says 'Join Waitlist' which is confusing and doesn't match requirements
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website
seed_data_creation: None - used sessionStorage for cart testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Secret Garden Box feature is mostly complete. Farm Basket page (/farm-basket-subscription) works correctly with all features: hero section, product card with EXCLUSIVE badge, Subscribe Quarterly/One-Time Purchase toggle, Add to Cart functionality, story section, What to Expect stats, Village Pantry grid, and FAQ accordion. Cart integration works correctly showing 'Secret Garden Box (Quarterly)' or 'Secret Garden Box (One-time)' with Rs.2,599 price. Only remaining issue: 'Join Waitlist' button in homepage hero section needs to be removed.
